com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

Class ActionPrinter<W extends ActionPrinter.Writer>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor.Base
      • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionPrinter<W>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Action.Visitor

    public class ActionPrinter<W extends ActionPrinter.Writer>
extends Action.Visitor.Base
    A simple visitor that prints actions. Typically, an instance of this class will be applied to a given action in a following manner.

    action.accept(new ActionPrinter());

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  ActionPrinter.Factory
      A factory class to create ActionPrinter objects.
      static interface  ActionPrinter.Writer
      An interface that abstracts various destinations to which ActionPrinter's output goes.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor

        Action.Visitor.Base

      • describeAction

        protected String describeAction(Action action)
        An extension point to customize format to print out each Action object.
        Parameters:
        action - an Action to be printed.

      • writeLine

        protected void writeLine(String s)
        An extension point to customize format a line to be printed by this object.
        Parameters:
        s - A line to be printed. Typically a description of an action.

      • indent

        protected String indent(int indent)
        An extension point to customize indentation style.
        Parameters:
        indent - Level of indentation.

      • indent

        An extension point to customize a string used for indentation.
